parameters.subject: =Congratulations! {{ $json.Name }} for moving forward

parameters.content:
## 🚀 START PROCESS

**Start Auto Candidate Shortlisting**

• **Purpose**: Manually initiate the automated candidate progression workflow
• **Trigger**: Click to start processing all candidates in the database
• **Process**: Begins sequential evaluation of candidate scores
• **Timing**: Run after new evaluation scores are added to the system
• **Best Practice**: Execute during business hours for immediate follow-up

## 📊 DATA RETRIEVAL

**Fetch All Candidate Records**

• **Purpose**: Retrieves complete candidate database from Google Sheets
• **Source**: 'Resume store' spreadsheet, Sheet2
• **Data Retrieved**: Names, scores, contact info, and evaluation summaries
• **Processing**: Loads all rows for batch analysis
• **Output**: Array of candidate objects with all profile information
• **Performance**: Handles large candidate databases efficiently

## 🔍 QUALIFICATION FILTER

**Filter High-Score Candidates**

• **Purpose**: Identifies candidates who meet minimum qualification threshold
• **Criteria**: Score > 70 points (indicating good fit or better)
• **Logic**: Filters out candidates with moderate or poor fit scores
• **Output**: Only qualified candidates proceed to next stage
• **Customization**: Threshold can be adjusted based on role requirements
• **Quality Control**: Ensures only viable candidates advance in process

## 📧 CANDIDATE NOTIFICATION

**Send Congratulations Email**

• **Purpose**: Automatically notifies qualified candidates of their progress
• **Recipient**: Uses candidate's email from database
• **Content**: Personalized congratulatory message with next steps
• **Scheduling Link**: Includes Calendly link for interview booking
• **Personalization**: Dynamic insertion of candidate name
• **Professional Touch**: Maintains positive candidate experience

## 📋 TASK MANAGEMENT

**Create Screening Task in ClickUp**

• **Purpose**: Automatically creates screening tasks for HR team
• **Task Details**: 
  - Title: 'Screening [Candidate Name] TO BE DONE'
  - Assigned to specific team member (ID: 95074494)
  - Organized in designated project structure
• **Workflow Integration**: Links hiring process to project management
• **Accountability**: Ensures follow-up actions are tracked and assigned
• **Efficiency**: Eliminates manual task creation for each qualified candidate

## 🎯 AUTO SHORTLIST & STAGE MOVEMENT WORKFLOW

**🚀 Purpose:** Streamlines the hiring process by automatically advancing qualified candidates and coordinating follow-up actions

**🔄 Workflow Process:**
1. **Data Collection**: Retrieve all candidate profiles and scores from database
2. **Smart Filtering**: Identify candidates with scores above qualification threshold (>70)
3. **Candidate Communication**: Send personalized advancement notifications with interview scheduling
4. **Task Automation**: Create screening tasks in project management system for HR team

**📈 Scoring Thresholds:**
• **>70 Points**: Qualified candidates advance to interview stage
• **≤70 Points**: Candidates remain in current stage for review

**✨ Key Benefits:**
• **Speed**: Immediate candidate progression without manual intervention
• **Consistency**: Standardized advancement criteria and communications
• **Organization**: Automated task creation ensures nothing falls through cracks
• **Experience**: Professional, timely communication enhances candidate journey
• **Efficiency**: Reduces manual work for HR teams

**📊 Integration Points:**
• Google Sheets (candidate database)
• Gmail (candidate communications) 
• ClickUp (task management)
• Calendly (interview scheduling)

## ⚙️ CONFIGURATION SETTINGS

**🔧 Customizable Parameters:**

**Score Threshold**: Currently set to 70
• Adjust based on role competitiveness
• Higher thresholds for senior positions
• Lower thresholds for entry-level roles

**Email Template**: Personalized messaging
• Subject: Congratulations + candidate name
• Body: Professional advancement notification
• CTA: Calendly scheduling link

**ClickUp Integration**:
• Team ID: 9016683627
• Space ID: 90162844741  
• Folder ID: 90164394824
• List ID: 901610812551
• Default Assignee: 95074494

**📝 Maintenance Notes:**
• Update email templates seasonally
• Review score thresholds monthly
• Monitor ClickUp task completion rates
• Ensure Calendly links remain active
